package.name: ego_localizer
package.description: Ego-pose EKF node: wraps fusion_core to fuse the spine IMU + wheel/lidar/ visual odometry (+ GNSS later) into a single nav_msgs/Odometry. M3 foundation; sensor-agnostic by design — add a frontend = add a subscription, not new filter code. See PLAN §5/§5.1 and milestone 3.
